Package org.eventb.core.seqprover

Interface IHypAction.IForwardInfHypAction

All Superinterfaces:
IHypAction
All Known Subinterfaces:
IHypAction.IRewriteHypAction
All Known Implementing Classes:
ForwardInfHypAction, RewriteHypAction
Enclosing interface:
IHypAction
public static interface IHypAction.IForwardInfHypAction extends IHypAction
Interface implemented by hypothesis actions that perform forward inference on the hypotheses in a sequent.
See Also:
  • IHypAction

  • Field Details

    • ACTION_TYPE

      static final String ACTION_TYPE
      The only legal action type for forward inference hypothesis actions.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Method Details

    • getHyps

      Collection<Predicate> getHyps()
      A set of hypotheses that are required in order to perform the forward inference.

      The inference can only be performed if all these hypotheses are present in the hypotheses of a sequent.The exact description of what is performed can be found in the javadoc for IInternalProverSequent

      Returns:
      The required hypotheses for the forward inference

    • getAddedFreeIdents

      FreeIdentifier[] getAddedFreeIdents()
      Returns an array of free identifiers introduced by the forward inference.

      The inference can only be performed if all these free identifiers are fresh (i.e. not present in the type environment) of a sequent.

      In case this inferrence can be performed on a sequent, these free identifiers will be added to its type environment. The exact description of what is performed can be found in the javadoc for IInternalProverSequent

      Returns:
      an array of free identifiers introduced by the forward inference

    • getInferredHyps

      Collection<Predicate> getInferredHyps()
      Returns the set of hypotheses inferred by this forward inferrence

      In case this inferrence can be performed on a sequent, these hypotheses will be added to its set of hypotheses. The exact description of what is performed can be found in the javadoc for IInternalProverSequent.

      Returns:
      the set of hypotheses inferred by this forward inferrence
